parameters.query: SELECT i.id AS interview_id, i.company_name, i.role_title, i.interview_track, i.interview_format, i.interview_stage, i.interview_date, i.interview_start_time, i.interview_end_time, i.application_id FROM interviews i WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}' AND i.interview_date = CURRENT_DATE AND (i.interview_date || ' ' || COALESCE(i.interview_end_time::text, '23:59:59'))::timestamp < NOW() AND i.status IN ('calendared', 'prep_ready', 'confirmed') LIMIT 10;

UPDATE interviews SET status = 'completed', completed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}' AND id = '{{ $json.interview_id }}' AND status IN ('calendared', 'prep_ready', 'confirmed') RETURNING id, company_name, role_title;

UPDATE applications SET status = 'interviewed', updated_at = NOW() WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}' AND id = '{{ $json.application_id }}' AND '{{ $json.application_id }}' != '' AND '{{ $json.application_id }}' IS NOT NULL;

SELECT i.id AS interview_id, i.company_name, i.role_title, i.interview_track, i.interview_format, i.interview_stage, i.interviewer_names, i.interviewer_titles, i.completed_at FROM interviews i WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}' AND i.status = 'completed' AND i.completed_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '60 minutes' AND i.completed_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM interview_communications ic WHERE ic.interview_id = i.id AND ic.communication_type = 'debrief_reminder') LIMIT 10;

INSERT INTO interview_communications (tenant_id, interview_id, communication_type, subject, body, recipient_email) VALUES ('{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}', '{{ $('Need Debrief?').first().json.interview_id }}', 'debrief_reminder', 'Debrief: {{ $('Need Debrief?').first().json.company_name }} - {{ $('Need Debrief?').first().json.role_title }}', 'Debrief reminder sent', '{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.notification_email }}');

SELECT i.id AS interview_id, i.company_name, i.role_title, i.interview_track, i.interview_format, i.interview_stage, i.interviewer_names, i.interviewer_titles, i.completed_at, i.what_to_prepare FROM interviews i WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}' AND i.status = 'completed' AND i.completed_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 minutes' AND i.completed_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND i.interview_format NOT IN ('phone_screen', 'assessment_centre', 'academic_selection_day') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM interview_communications ic WHERE ic.interview_id = i.id AND ic.communication_type = 'thank_you_draft') LIMIT 5;

INSERT INTO interview_communications (tenant_id, interview_id, communication_type, subject, body, recipient_email, model_used, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens) VALUES ('{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}', '{{ $json.interview_id }}', 'thank_you_draft', 'Thank You - {{ $json.company_name }} {{ $json.role_title }} Interview', '{{ $json.thank_you_body.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.notification_email }}', '{{ $json.model_used }}', {{ $json.prompt_tokens }}, {{ $json.completion_tokens }});
SELECT id AS tenant_id, name AS tenant_name, notification_email, candidate_profile, search_config, email_config FROM tenants WHERE is_active = true

SELECT i.id AS interview_id, i.company_name, i.role_title, i.interview_track, i.interview_format, i.interview_stage, i.interview_date, i.interview_start_time, i.interview_end_time, i.application_id FROM interviews i WHERE i.interview_date = CURRENT_DATE AND (i.interview_date || ' ' || COALESCE(i.interview_end_time::text, '23:59:59'))::timestamp < NOW() AND i.status IN ('calendared', 'prep_ready', 'confirmed') LIMIT 10;

UPDATE interviews SET status = 'completed', completed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $json.interview_id }}' AND status IN ('calendared', 'prep_ready', 'confirmed') RETURNING id, company_name, role_title;
UPDATE applications SET status = 'interviewed', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $json.application_id }}' AND '{{ $json.application_id }}' != '' AND '{{ $json.application_id }}' IS NOT NULL;

SELECT i.id AS interview_id, i.company_name, i.role_title, i.interview_track, i.interview_format, i.interview_stage, i.interviewer_names, i.interviewer_titles, i.completed_at FROM interviews i WHERE i.status = 'completed' AND i.completed_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '60 minutes' AND i.completed_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM interview_communications ic WHERE ic.interview_id = i.id AND ic.communication_type = 'debrief_reminder') LIMIT 10;

INSERT INTO interview_communications (interview_id, communication_type, subject, body, recipient_email) VALUES ('{{ $('Need Debrief?').first().json.interview_id }}', 'debrief_reminder', 'Debrief: {{ $('Need Debrief?').first().json.company_name }} - {{ $('Need Debrief?').first().json.role_title }}', 'Debrief reminder sent', 'chellamma.uk@gmail.com');

SELECT i.id AS interview_id, i.company_name, i.role_title, i.interview_track, i.interview_format, i.interview_stage, i.interviewer_names, i.interviewer_titles, i.completed_at, i.what_to_prepare FROM interviews i WHERE i.status = 'completed' AND i.completed_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 minutes' AND i.completed_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND i.interview_format NOT IN ('phone_screen', 'assessment_centre', 'academic_selection_day') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM interview_communications ic WHERE ic.interview_id = i.id AND ic.communication_type = 'thank_you_draft') LIMIT 5;

INSERT INTO interview_communications (interview_id, communication_type, subject, body, recipient_email, model_used, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens) VALUES ('{{ $json.interview_id }}', 'thank_you_draft', 'Thank You - {{ $json.company_name }} {{ $json.role_title }} Interview', '{{ $json.thank_you_body.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 'chellamma.uk@gmail.com', '{{ $json.model_used }}', {{ $json.prompt_tokens }}, {{ $json.completion_tokens }});
